test-method.name: validLoginNavigatesToDashboard
test-method.description: TC-UI-01: Valid login navigates to notes dashboard

test-method.name: emptyFormShowsValidationError
test-method.description: TC-UI-NEG-02: Empty form submission shows validation error

test-method.name: invalidCredentialsShowError
test-method.description: TC-UI-NEG-01: Invalid credentials show error message

test-method.name: createNoteAppearsInList
test-method.description: TC-UI-02: Create a note via UI and verify it appears in the list

test-method.name: getNotesReturns200WithinThreshold
test-method.description: TC-API-01: GET /notes returns 200 and a list within 2 seconds

test-method.name: createNoteViaApiReturns200
test-method.description: TC-API-02: POST /notes creates a note successfully

test-method.name: deletedNoteDisappearsFromUI
test-method.description: TC-E2E-02: Note deleted via API disappears from UI (FR-06 + FR-07)

test-method.name: tc01_uiCreatedNoteMatchesApiResponse
test-method.description: TC-01: UI-created note matches API response (Category, Title, Description)
